creator: mi+thun@aldan.algebra.com
text:
Dmitry, thank you very much for the proposed upgrade. Unfortunately, the
binary blob you attached does not uncompress. file(1) classifies it as
just "data" (unrecognized binary format).

New ports should be submitted as .shar files -- not the unreadable .tgz

Since we already have net/asterisk16, your work would be an upgrade for
it, so you should simply include (unified) diffs.

Please, follow-up with textual data. Thanks! Yours,

    -mi

P.S. 1.6.2.9 is currently the latest from Asterisk developers...
